notes: Vendor hint site 151st-street-dental.edan.io returned HTTP 403/401 on every fetch attempt (bot-blocked) — could not load the candidate site itself to corroborate per the hard rule. Third-party evidence (WebMD directory, loaded) shows a practice called '151ST STREET DENTAL' at the exact record address (9017 W 151st St, Orland Park, IL 60462) with dentists Delaurentis, Janna/Leesa/William Mitsos, and Palak Patel — but phone (708) 226-6700, NOT the record's (708) 403-0071. A search-result snippet (not loaded) ties '32 Pearls Dental Inc' NPI record to the same address/phone (226-6700) with authorized official 'Parth Patel DMD', suggesting the record's legal entity name may correspond to this DBA, but this is unconfirmed via the practice's own site. Separately, the record's phone (708) 403-0071 resolves in search to 'Silver Lake Family Dental' at a wholly different address (9611 165th St Suite 14, Orland Park, IL 60467) — likely a stale/incorrect phone digit in source data rather than a true successor situation, since the record's actual street address does not match Silver Lake's at all. No corroborated own-website found; recommend a phone call to confirm.

Site homepage lists phone (708) 395-7295, which differs from the record's phone (708) 532-8889 (patientconnect365 lists 532-8889 for the same practice/address) — likely an updated phone number, not a different entity, since practice name/address are consistent everywhere. A 404 on /about-us and no careers link on the homepage means no doctor roster or hiring info could be confirmed; a /meet-the-doctor or similar page may exist but was not found within budget. Searching that exact phone number resolves to a DIFFERENT, unrelated practice: 'Orland Dental Care' (dentists Dr. Kyle Takla and Dr. Mahmoud Abusaoud) at 14360 Lagrange Rd, Orland Park, IL 60462 — a different street entirely. Third-party directories (Yelp, WebMD, Healthgrades, Sharecare, Vitals, dentist-network.com) consistently list a real 'Gary Gunkel DDS' practice nearby at 14475 John Humphrey Dr Ste 310, Orland Park, IL 60462, phone (708) 460-1109 — close to but not an exact match of the record's street number (14430) or phone.
notes: No website could be corroborated for the record's exact address (14430 John Humphrey Dr) or phone ((708) 364-8900) as belonging to 'Gary Gunkel DDS'. The record's phone number now belongs, per search results, to a different practice ('Orland Dental Care', Dr. Kyle Takla / Dr. Mahmoud Abusaoud) at a different street (14360 Lagrange Rd) — flagging a possible successor/data-quality conflict per the phone-search rule. A real Gary Gunkel DDS practice does exist nearby (14475 John Humphrey Dr Ste 310, phone (708) 460-1109) per multiple consistent directories, but its address/phone do not match the record exactly, so it was not used to populate website/doctor fields. Also checked vendor_website_hint's implied neighborhood — 'Inspire Dental Wellness' (inspiredentalwellness.com) sits at 14512 John Humphrey Dr, independently owned by Dr. Erica Zolnierczyk, DMD, unrelated to Gary Gunkel; that address also does not match the record's 14430. Recommend a phone call to Orland Dental Care and/or the 14475 John Humphrey Dr office to clarify what currently occupies 14430.

No careers/hiring page was located. No DSO/group branding observed — appears independently owned family practice.

notes: Classic multi-unit successor situation: the record's phone number ((708) 430-4990) is now held by 'Chionis Dental' at Unit B of the same street address, an entirely different dentist/brand (fetch of chionisdental.com returned HTTP 403 so could not directly confirm suite/roster, but the phone match is corroborated via independent search results). The originally named dentist, Karen L. Opferman DDS, appears to now practice under the name 'Karen Murphy' at Unit D of the same building with a new phone number (708) 239-7700 — confirmed directly via Healthgrades (loaded), which explicitly states 'formerly Karen L. Opferman DDS'. Because the record's phone corroborates to a different, unrelated practice while the original named dentist relocated within the building under a new name/number, this is reported as an ownership_conflict per the successor rule rather than attributed to either entity as 'the' website.
